ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Recordtype_Dev_Name__c, "NATT_Units_Quote") && ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Amendment") && SBQQ__Quote__r.Number_of_Locked_Lines__c > 0&& SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c < 0 && SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c != SBQQ__RequiredBy__r.SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c && ISBLANK(NATT_P_N__c) && NATT_Is_Base_Unit__c = FALSE
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Because some units are locked, you may not remove on unit options. This would result in a unit Part Number Change. If you want to change the Unit Part Numbers for the remaining unlocked units, zero out the remaining unlocked units and create a new quote.
